text:
In the quiet town of Eldergrove you lived an eccentric old cat named Rufus the Sage. You spent most of your days lounging by the firePLACE reading ghost stories from an ancient tomes passed down through generations.

One peculiar night, a howling wind howled through the trees like the lamentations of lost souls. Intrigued, you embarked on a midnight quest through the woods to find the source. As you wandered through the shadowed forest, you heard a sound like distant cries of sorrow.

Following the noise you stumbled upon a grove where the moonlight reflected off rows of ancient stone statues. At the center stood a particularly distraught sculpture. It wore a shroud of mourning - an old owl draped in dark feathers.

Puzzled, you pressed closer. The owl’s eyes were hollow, filled only with a grieving light. "Who arts this monument?" you wondered.

The owl whispered, "Old Gnarlwings mourns the passing of his mate. You
